title: guajava guineensis
intro: Guajava guineensis, also known as the West African guava, is a species of flowering plant in the guava family, Rutaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Guajava guineensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe wounds. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
